title: Threats & Malicious Harassment From YWCA Associates (2020-2022)
content:
# Threats & Malicious Harassment From YWCA Associates (2020-2022)

## Overview

Documentation of threats and malicious harassment from individuals associated with YWCA Missoula during 2020-2022.

## Documented Incidents

- Threatening communications
- Online harassment campaigns
- Coordinated defamation efforts
- Attempts to interfere with employment

## Evidence

- Screenshots of threatening messages
- Documentation of harassment patterns
- Witness statements
- Timeline of incidents

## Legal Implications

- Potential criminal harassment charges
- Civil defamation claims
- Pattern evidence for broader civil rights case
